scripts.test:creator: NODE_ENV=test mocha test/test-creator-api.js
scripts.compose:test: docker compose run --rm -e NODE_ENV=test app npm test
scripts.compose:test:utente: docker compose run --rm -e NODE_ENV=test app npx mocha test/test-utente-api.js
scripts.compose:test:creator: docker compose run --rm -e NODE_ENV=test app npx mocha test/test-creator-api.js
scripts.compose:test:admin: docker compose run --rm -e NODE_ENV=test app npx mocha test/test-admin-api.js
